chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Criminal Jail Appeal No.S-51 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection “A” 2. For orders on M.A.No.7400/2021 (E/A). 3. For orders on M.A.No.7401/2021 (426 Cr.PC). 4. For hearing of main case. 09.12.2021. Syed Shafquat Ali Shah, Advocate for the appellants. Complainant is present in person. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Addl.P.G for the State. =*= Heard arguments. The appellants after due trial have been convicted and sentenced to various terms, aggregate sentence whereof is spreading over two years each with fine/daman, by learned 1st Additional Sessions Judge/MCTC, Qamber, vide judgment dated 30.10.2021, which is impugned by them before this Court by preferring the instant appeal from jail, which has been admitted to regular hearing and in the meanwhile they have sought for suspension of their sentence and their release on bail, mainly for the reason that the sentence awarded is short one; hearing of appeal is likely to take time and they were enjoying the concession of bail at trial, which is not opposed by learned Addl.P.G for the State, who is assisted by the complainant. In view of above, while relying upon case of Abdul Hameed Vs. Muhammad Abdullah and others (1999 SCMR 2589), the sentence to the appellants is suspended, consequently, they are admitted to bail subject to their furnishing surety in sum of Rs.30,000/- each and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. The listed application (M.A. No.7401/2021) is disposed of accordingly. Matter is adjourned to 03.02.2022.
No.7401/2021) is disposed of accordingly. Matter is adjourned to 03.02.2022. JUDGE
